ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
If(TETLRadioButton.Selected.Value="Show All Test Steps",

    ForAll(Sequence(CountRows(ThisItem.test_step_logs)),Patch(Last(FirstN(ThisItem.test_step_logs,Value)),{RowNumber:Value})),

    Filter(ForAll(Sequence(CountRows(ThisItem.test_step_logs)),Patch(Last(FirstN(ThisItem.test_step_logs,Value)),{RowNumber:Value})),LookUp(ThisRecord.customFieldInfo,Lower(name)=Lower("UAT Category")).value=Text(LookUp(colBusinessValuesTS,label="Business",value)) || LookUp(ThisRecord.customFieldInfo,Lower(name)=Lower("UAT Category")).value=Text(LookUp(colBusinessValuesTS,label="N/A",value)) || IsBlank(LookUp(ThisRecord.customFieldInfo,Lower(name)=Lower("UAT Category")).value)= true )

)
